evidence.claim: The system allows authentication using a card and PIN.
evidence.fact: The system authenticates users by card number and PIN before any transaction.
evidence.user_story_span: authenticate using my card and PIN
evidence.fact_span: authenticates users by card number and PIN

evidence.claim: The system locks the account after 3 consecutive failed attempts.
evidence.fact: The system locks the account after 3 consecutive failed authentication attempts.
evidence.user_story_span: my account locked after 3 consecutive failed attempts
evidence.fact_span: locks the account after 3 consecutive failed authentication attempts

evidence.claim: Card and PIN are the required authentication methods.
evidence.fact: Users must present a valid card and correct PIN to initiate a withdrawal; after three wrong attempts their account becomes locked.
evidence.user_story_span: Card and PIN are the required authentication methods
evidence.fact_span: present a valid card and correct PIN
